hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: High-density overview of active trading competitions and rewards.

titles: PerkX is where crypto meets perks.
descriptions: We’re not a DEX, not a CEX, not your ex.
We sniff out every juicy Web3 deal, from hidden signup rewards to staking sweeteners and surprise airdrops and slap them neatly in one spot.
Like a crypto coupon aunt, but cooler.

what_we_do.title: What We Actually Do:
items: Collect all the CeFi + DeFi deals, promos, rewards, and bonuses in one place
Translate all that fine print into something your non-crypto friend might actually understand
Help you feel like a crypto genius without lifting a finger (or signing 5 MetaMask transactions)

what_we_dont_do.title: What We Don't Do:
items: Handle your funds (you keep your coins, we keep our hands to ourselves)
Ask you to “ape in” or “diamond hand” anything
Force you into weird Discord cults to unlock benefits

footer_note.title: We believe Web3 shouldn’t feel like decoding the Matrix.
footer_note.description: It should feel like walking into a buffet where everything’s already paid for with free cashback and referral bonuses you didn’t know you had.
footer_note.tldr: TL;DR: We find the perks. You claim them. Everyone’s happy.
footer_note.tldr_note: (Except that one person still paying full fees. RIP.)

meta.title: PerkX Terms of Use
meta.description: Read the terms of use for PerkX

intro.paragraph1: These Terms of Use ("Terms") set forth the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between PerkX and users of the Service. The Service is operated by [Company Legal Name], a company incorporated in [Jurisdiction] ("PerkX," "we," "us," or "our").
intro.paragraph2: By accessing or using the PerkX website, application, or any related services (collectively, the "Service"), you ("User," "you," or "your") confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to be legally bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, you must not access or use the Service.

definitions.title: 1. Definitions
items: Account means a registered PerkX user account.
Member means a User who has successfully registered an Account.
Non-Member means a User who accesses the Service without registration.
Partner Exchange means a third-party virtual asset exchange, trading platform, or service provider that offers referral-based benefits, rebates, rewards, or promotions under its own terms.
Referral Code / Referral Link means a code or link used by a Partner Exchange to attribute a User's registration or activity to PerkX or to another Member.
Benefit(s) means any rebate, fee discount, reward, commission, campaign incentive, or similar advantage provided solely by a Partner Exchange.
UID means the user identifier issued by a Partner Exchange.

eligibility.title: 2. Eligibility
items: You must be at least sixteen (16) years old, or the minimum legal age required in your jurisdiction, whichever is higher.
You must have full legal capacity to enter into a binding agreement.
You must not be prohibited from using the Service under applicable laws, regulations, sanctions, or Partner Exchange rules.
The Service is not intended for Users located in jurisdictions where access or use would be illegal or restricted.

registration.title: 3. Registration and Account Management
items: To access certain features, you may be required to register as a Member and create an Account.
You agree to provide accurate, complete, and up-to-date information.
You are solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your Account credentials and for all activities conducted under your Account.
You must notify PerkX immediately if you suspect unauthorized access or security breaches.
PerkX shall not be liable for losses resulting from your failure to safeguard your Account credentials.

nature_of_service.title: 4. Nature of the Service
items: Referral and information platform only. PerkX provides referral links, informational listings, and tools that allow Users to discover and access Partner Exchange offers.
No cashback or rewards provided by PerkX. PerkX does not accept, hold, distribute, or pay any cashback, rebate, reward, or commission to Users.
No control over Partner Exchanges. All Benefits are provided, calculated, and administered solely by Partner Exchanges, under their own systems and rules.

no_custody.title: 4A. No Custody, No Payments, No Money Transmission
items: PerkX does not hold, receive, store, transmit, manage, control, or custody any fiat currency, virtual assets, digital assets, stablecoins, or other value on behalf of Users.
PerkX does not process payments, payouts, settlements, or withdrawals of any kind.
PerkX is not a bank, payment institution, money services business, remittance provider, e-money issuer, broker, dealer, or investment adviser.
All Benefits are issued directly by Partner Exchanges into the User's Partner Exchange account.
PerkX has no authority to access, freeze, reverse, delay, claw back, or otherwise affect any User funds or Benefits.

partner_offers.title: 4B. Partner Offers and Accuracy Disclaimer
items: Information displayed regarding Partner Exchanges or Benefits is provided for general informational and marketing purposes only.
Partner Exchange offers may change, expire, be suspended, or be region-restricted at any time without notice.
PerkX does not guarantee:
In case of any discrepancy, Partner Exchange terms shall prevail.
Listing a Partner Exchange does not imply endorsement, partnership, agency, or guarantee.
sub_items: the accuracy or completeness of offer information,

partner_exchanges.title: 5. Partner Exchanges and Benefits
items: Your use of any Partner Exchange is governed solely by that Partner Exchange's terms, policies, and compliance requirements.
Partner Exchanges determine:
PerkX bears no responsibility for Partner Exchange decisions or system failures.

uid_linking.title: 6. UID Linking and Attribution
items: If UID linking is supported, Users may link only UIDs that belong to them.
Attribution depends entirely on Partner Exchange tracking logic and technical systems.
PerkX may reject or remove UID links if misuse or abuse is suspected.

prohibited_conduct.title: 7. Prohibited Conduct
items: Abuse referral systems or Benefits through wash trading, self-trading, or manipulative behavior.
Use bots, crawlers, or automated tools without authorization.
Attempt unauthorized access, hacking, or security testing.
Provide false information or impersonate others.
Violate Partner Exchange terms or applicable laws.
Interfere with Service operations or other Users' access.
prohibited_conduct.conclusion: PerkX may investigate violations and take appropriate action.

service_availability.title: 8. Service Availability and Modification
items: The Service is provided on a best-effort basis without guarantee of uninterrupted availability.
PerkX may suspend, modify, or discontinue any part of the Service for operational, legal, or technical reasons.
Partner Exchanges may be added or removed at any time.

no_investment_advice.title: 9. No Investment Advice; Risk Disclosure
items: PerkX does not provide financial, investment, tax, or legal advice.
Trading digital assets involves significant risk, including loss of funds.
Partner Exchanges operate independently and may be subject to outages, policy changes, or insolvency.

intellectual_property.title: 10. Intellectual Property
items: All intellectual property rights in the Service belong to PerkX or its licensors.
Users receive a limited, non-exclusive, revocable license to use the Service.
Users may not copy, modify, distribute, or reverse engineer the Service without permission.

suspension_termination.title: 11. Suspension and Termination
items: Users may stop using the Service at any time.
PerkX may suspend or terminate access if Users violate these Terms, applicable laws, or Partner Exchange rules.
Termination of PerkX access does not affect Partner Exchange Benefits already issued or denied.

disclaimers.title: 12. Disclaimers
items: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available."
PerkX disclaims all warranties, including merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose.
PerkX does not warrant Partner Exchange performance, accuracy, or availability.

limitation_liability.title: 13. Limitation of Liability
items: To the maximum extent permitted by law, PerkX shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages.
PerkX is not liable for missed Benefits, trading losses, or Partner Exchange actions.
Where liability cannot be excluded, PerkX's total liability shall be limited to [cap amount].

indemnification.title: 14. Indemnification
indemnification.content: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless PerkX from claims arising from your misuse of the Service, violation of these Terms, or violation of law.

privacy.title: 15. Privacy
privacy.paragraph1: Personal data collected or processed in connection with the Service shall be handled in accordance with the PerkX Privacy Policy, which forms an integral part of these Terms.
privacy.paragraph2: In the event of any inconsistency between these Terms and the Privacy Policy with respect to personal data, the Privacy Policy shall prevail.

amendments.title: 16. Amendments, Governing Law and Jurisdiction
amendments.paragraph1: PerkX may update these Terms at any time. Continued use after updates constitutes acceptance.
amendments.paragraph2: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which PerkX's operating entity is incorporated, without regard to conflict of law principles.
amendments.paragraph3: Any dispute, claim, or controversy arising out of or in connection with these Terms or the Service shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts of such jurisdiction.
